digest.greeting: Good evening, Jean. The dashboard shows several carry-forward items closed today, including the CoE newsletter follow-up, the CSC portfolio path, the Friday project-folder reminder, the Salesforce support loop with Janet, and the CM-CoE intake triage. A few project-risk and capture items still need attention, and Teams enrichment was rate-limited, so this EOD stays grounded in the dashboard plus Outlook Calendar and Email.

items.label: Confirmed the CoE newsletter owner and status
items.detail: This follow-up is now marked complete in the dashboard after carrying forward from the morning digest.

items.label: Prepared the CSC portfolio follow-up path
items.detail: The CSC portfolio follow-up item is now marked complete in the dashboard.

items.label: Followed up on project folders for Friday readiness
items.detail: The reminder to follow up with the team about project folders being ready by Friday is now marked complete.

items.label: Closed the loop with Janet on Salesforce support
items.detail: The reminder to tell Janet that Nicolas had been contacted about Salesforce project support is now marked complete.

items.label: Triage moved forward on the CM-CoE intake
items.detail: The dashboard marks the CM-CoE follow-up intake item complete, and Outlook shows Jean routed the Attorney Recommendation intake to Mar this afternoon.

items.label: Track LevelPath UAT and SSO readiness before go-live
items.detail: LevelPath remains the highest-risk open item. UAT has moved forward, go-live is still targeted for July 24, and production SSO still needs confirmation before the path is fully clear.

items.label: Follow up with Katie about the missing File Release project
items.detail: Clarify why the File Release project is not showing and what Katie needs next.

items.label: Lock next steps from the Jhara and Mental Health meetings
items.detail: Carry forward any owners, milestones, or blockers that still need to be captured from Jhara's portfolio roadblocks discussion and the Mental Health project meeting.

items.label: Capture project implications from attorney-client privilege training
items.detail: Today's EPMO Team Meeting focused on attorney-client privilege with Chelsea Schinnour. Capture any process, documentation, or communication changes that affect Legal Change Management, CoE, or portfolio work.

items.label: Review Lucia's urgent client notifications SOP
items.detail: Lucia sent a work-in-progress urgent client notifications SOP and asked for Jean's thoughts on how to proceed.

items.label: Discuss the Project Coordinator handoff plan
items.detail: Sara shared that Project Coordinators will report to Jean in the interim and asked to discuss the handoff, including Janet's original plan.

items.label: CoE Biweekly Touchpoint was cancelled
items.detail: Outlook Email shows Jean sent a cancellation for the CoE Biweekly Touchpoint to Mar Garcia, David Molano, and Frank Von Hassell this afternoon.

items.label: Project Coordinators will report to Jean on an interim basis
items.detail: Sara wrote that the PCs will report to Jean in the interim and asked to discuss the handoff and Janet's original plan.

items.label: Jhara out of office starts
items.detail: Plan around Jhara being out Thursday and Friday.

items.label: Amazon Connect Weekly Project Sync
items.detail: Agenda includes open items, blockers, prior action items, and decisions needed. Use the sync to clarify what must be ready.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Regular BCP/Incident Response touchpoint. Bring open risks or owner decisions from today's capture.

items.label: SMS Automation Optimization Weekly Project Status
items.detail: Agenda includes progress, priorities, resources, risks, blockers, and next steps.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team coordination forum for progress, roadblocks, and shared learning.
